{{Quote|The Vray are a gentle species. Without an escort, the evacuation convoy will be defenseless against the Yuuzhan Vong.|Leia Organa Solo to General Muun about the Vray|<ref name="SBS" />}}
The '''Vray''' were a gentle [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that was one of many forced to flee from the invading [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Galaxy/Legends|pangalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], started when they invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|another]].<ref name="SBS" /> In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].</ref> [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ally and former [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] leader, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Gender/Legends|her]] [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] traveled to the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] to request that its [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Muun (individual)|Muun]], provide them with [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to form an escort to protect the evacuation [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of the Vray. There were at least a hundred thousand Vray who had been being evacuated for [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the Solos arrived in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]].<ref name="SBS" />

Muun refused at first, unwilling to leave the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] vulnerable to a Yuuzhan Vong attack. However, when Yuuzhang Vong [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] sent [[Nom Anor]] to Bilbringi to tell the [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]] that he would have many [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] if the Jedi did not surrender to the Yuuzhan Vong, Muun saw protecting the Vray refugees as an opportunity to boost his career. He therefore led a convoy of ten vessels to escort the Vray to safety.<ref name="SBS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vray was mentioned in [[Troy Denning]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star|''Star by Star'']], a [[2001]] installment of the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' book series.<ref name="SBS" />
